plus.title: Levellio Plus
plus.founding: You're a founding member — Plus is on us during the beta 💜

account.title: Account
account.signOutConfirmBody: You can sign back in anytime.
account.deleteHelp: Permanently deletes your account and your community + project data (memberships, contributions, posts, comments, reactions, follows). This can't be undone.
account.deleteConfirmBody: This permanently removes your account and your community + project data. It can't be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

beta.title: You're an early beta member 💜
beta.note: Levellio is completely free during the beta. There is nothing to buy, and no payment will ever start without your consent.

ai.title: AI Quest Suggestions
ai.note: Levellio is fully usable without AI. On-device mode needs no key and no network. Cloud mode uses your own API key, which we never see.
ai.keyHelper: Stored only in your device's secure keychain. Never logged or uploaded.
ai.onDeviceHelp: Runs privately on your device. No key or network required.
ai.noKeyHelp: Prefer not to manage a key? On-device mode works with no key at all.

community.title: Community & feedback
community.note: Community Projects let you build habits together toward a shared, real-world goal. These controls are yours — turn them on when you want them.
community.prepHelp: When you pick a personal goal to "prepare" for a project goal: ON makes its habits count toward the project goal's progress; OFF just shows it as a reminder.

insights.title: Habit insights
insights.note: Levellio keeps simple notes on your device about how your habits form, so a future update can show you insights. Nothing is uploaded — no analytics, no accounts. You choose exactly what's recorded.
insights.recordContribution: Track which activities build which buckets
insights.includeSourceActivities: Include which activities inspired a bucket
insights.recordSession: Record activity sessions (duration, time of day)
